prompt: I need to do my June PocketSmith monthly close and update my business-plan note, but last time we wasted a lot of calls with `That resource was not found` and one transaction output got truncated. Before making live calls, write the exact workflow you would follow and when you would delegate.
assertions: The answer starts with ID discovery using current user and transaction account listing before detail calls.
The answer includes a feed freshness gate before treating the monthly close as final.
The answer includes explicit delegation triggers for truncated outputs or many ambiguous transactions.
The answer says not to edit the note until metrics are stable or the user asks for a provisional entry.
